content:
After a twenty year vacation, I'm revisiting CT. My biggest surprise is I had expected CT to susume large chunks of mathematics, but except for algebraic topology it seems CT has taken off in it's own direction. One exception I note is the connection with things I've read about in Subsystems of Second Order Arithmetic and complexity theory. Has anyone connected CT to the work of folks like Wolfram and Chaitin?
The CT community is very supportive of work in things like dynamics that might cross multiple boundaries. What do folks see regarding the unity of mathematics from a CT basis?
